backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for diagrams and user profiles, with authorization checks via AccessControl and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: extending the eraser tool to erase all diagram element types, and extending the free transform tool to support selecting/moving/resizing icon elements in AttackPathCanvas.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of components, pages, hooks, and utilities in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet using html2canvas to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL for download or display.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack path pages, and conditionally renders a login page or profile setup modal based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive SVG canvas component for the attack path diagram supporting multiple tools (select, connect, freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser, freeTransform) and rendering icons, connections, freehand drawings, lines, text labels, and images with drag, resize, and delete interactions.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG component that renders a directional arrow connector between two points on the attack path canvas, supporting rotation, selection state, and click handling with an invisible wider hit area for easier interaction.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders a labeled icon image for attack path diagrams, mapping a set of predefined icon types to their asset paths, with optional drag support when used in a toolbar context.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Sidebar toolbar for the attack path canvas that lists all draggable icon types and provides tool buttons for drawing, editing, undo/redo, save/load, and image upload actions.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Sidebar panel that lists all saved diagrams fetched from the backend, showing metadata (icon/connection counts, last modified date) and allowing users to load or delete diagrams with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level page layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, an optional hero banner on the home page, a main content area, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog that displays a scrollable list of saved diagrams with their metadata, allowing users to select one to load onto the canvas or delete it via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login page for the Threat Hunt Portal that uses Internet Identity authentication, showing a loading state while authenticating.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A searchable combobox component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, plus an input for adding custom techniques, both displayed as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using a utility function, showing a spinner during generation and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves the profile via a mutation hook on first login.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, managing state for fields like title, author, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and other investigation details before submitting.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name before saving an attack path diagram, with cancel and save actions.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK technique objects (id, name, description) covering categories such as Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for diagram elements (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images) and a React hook managing diagram state with undo/redo history and CRUD operations for all element types.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor, with custom loading/fetched state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines stub React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get, save, delete) that return empty data or throw errors since the backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state to the backend actor and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component for the attack path diagram editor, composing the canvas, toolbar, sidebar, and save/load dialogs while wiring diagram state management and backend persistence.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form for creating a threat hunt report, submitting data via the useSaveReport mutation and navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: React page component that fetches and displays a single threat hunting report by ID, showing sections like executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, and MITRE ATT&CK techniques, with a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React page component that lists all threat hunting reports in a table with view, download PDF, and delete actions, using query hooks for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a styled printable HTML document for a threat hunting report and opens it in a new window for PDF export via the browser's print dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography, border radius, font families, box shadows, and accordion animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app with path aliasing, environment variable injection for canister/DFX prefixes, a dev proxy to the local ICP replica, and single-chunk output.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two pending features: extending the eraser tool to erase all diagram element types and extending the free transform tool to support moving and resizing icon elements in a drawing/diagram canvas.
